headline: Is It Time To Revisit Federal Realty (FRT) After Its Recent Share Price Rally?
summary: Investors may be considering whether Federal Realty Investment Trust at around US$112.53 represents fair value or a potential mispricing opportunity at the moment. The stock has posted returns of 3.2% over 7 days, 9.1% over 30 days, 13.6% year to date and 27.5% over 1 year, which may have influenced how the market views both its growth potential and risk. Recent coverage has described Federal Realty Investment Trust as a retail focused REIT, keeping attention on factors such as consumer...
